properties.name: application.server.port
properties.description: The port on which the application server listens

properties.name: application.db.host
properties.description: The host address of the database the application connects to

properties.name: application.db.port
properties.description: The port on which the database listens

properties.name: application.db.name
properties.description: The name of the database the application connects to

properties.name: application.db.user
properties.description: The username to connect to the database

properties.name: application.db.password
properties.description: The password to connect to the database

properties.name: application.cors-allowed-origins
properties.description: A list of origins that are allowed to access resources on this server, used for Cross-Origin Resource Sharing (CORS) settings
